seoTitle: Garden Grove Unified Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays & Breaks
seoDescription: Garden Grove Unified 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 18 first day, May 29 last day, holidays, Thanksgiving recess, winter recess, and spring recess.
calendarNotes: Garden Grove Unified publishes the 2025-2026 calendar as an official online list rather than a PDF download. The school year starts August 18, 2025 and ends May 29, 2026. Families should use the GGUSD calendar page for the official online source and check school-level communications for site-specific events.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Garden Grove Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Garden Grove Unified starts the 2025-2026 school year on Monday, August 18, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garden Grove Unified Spring Recess in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Garden Grove Unified in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 29, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Why is there no PDF link for the GGUSD 2025-2026 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The reviewed GGUSD source is an official online calendar list. No PDF download link was provided for this school year.

yearNumbers.label: Official Source
yearNumbers.detail: The source is the official GGUSD calendar webpage, not a PDF.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 18, 2025.
